splits.title: I Didn't Dream
splits.author: Alberta J. Engar
splits.start_boundary: I Didn't Dream By Alberta J. Engar
splits.end_boundary: Amy Brown Lyman --- END FILE CONTENT ---

files.notes: The file contains two distinct pieces: a lengthy 'Notes from the Field' section with reports from various missions and stakes, followed by a poem 'I Didn't Dream' by Alberta J. Engar that received honorable mention in a poetry contest. The poem is clearly separated and has its own title and author attribution.

splits.title: Social Service - Maintaining Peculiarities and Developing Originality
splits.start_boundary: LESSON DEPARTMENT 247 Social Service (Fourth Week in June)

files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections from the Lesson Department: Theology and Testimony (Lesson IX about Emma Smith), Teachers' Topic on the Beatitudes, Literature lesson on Celtic literature and Irish poets, and Social Service lesson on maintaining individuality in education. Each section has clear subject matter boundaries and different content focus.
